**[[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]<ref name="Guide">''[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]'' states that all [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] were part of the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]].</ref>

'''Gamma Squad''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] squad of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. The commandos of Gamma Squad suffered heavy losses at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]], with only [[Stoker]] surviving. Later reformed, they were dispatched to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]] where they infiltrated a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] base, replacing command codes with those of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
